scripts.build: wasm-pack build --target no-modules --out-dir dist --out-name image-poligonizer && cd dist && mv image-poligonizer_bg.wasm image-poligonizer.algo_bg.wasm && sed -i 's/image-poligonizer_bg/image-poligonizer.algo_bg/g' image-poligonizer.js && mv image-poligonizer.js image-poligonizer.algo.js && mv image-poligonizer.d.ts image-poligonizer.algo.d.ts
scripts.dev: wasm-pack build --dev --target no-modules --out-dir dist --out-name image-poligonizer && cd dist && mv image-poligonizer_bg.wasm image-poligonizer.algo_bg.wasm && sed -i 's/image-poligonizer_bg/image-poligonizer.algo_bg/g' image-poligonizer.js && mv image-poligonizer.js image-poligonizer.algo.js && mv image-poligonizer.d.ts image-poligonizer.algo.d.ts
